title: Test mode UI updates require page refresh
symptom: When running a workflow in test mode, the UI does not update to reflect the execution until the page is refreshed.
root_cause: The issue arises from improper WebSocket handling in the nginx configuration, which prevents real-time updates in the UI during test executions. The connection upgrade for WebSockets is not correctly set, leading to a failure in UI feedback.
fix_steps: Add or modify the following lines: 'proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';' and 'proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;'.
Save the configuration and restart nginx.
Test the workflow again in n8n to see if the UI updates correctly.
agent_instruction: Update the nginx configuration to properly handle WebSocket connections and restart the service.
